entries.speaker: cael
lines: You came. I knew you would. I hoped you wouldn't.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Cael. Step away from the machine.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I can't do that. I wish I could explain it in a way
that would make you understand, but there isn't time. The
machine is almost ready.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: Ready for what?

entries.speaker: cael
lines: To end it. All of it. The Pallor, the cycles, the
door — everything. I found a way. But I have to be inside when
it breaks.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: Cael, the Pallor is using you. Whatever solution
you think you've found—

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I know what it's doing. I've known since the siege.
It whispers, Maren. It tells you things about the people you
love — things that aren't true, but feel true.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: And the worst part is that it doesn't need to lie.
It just needs you to stop hoping.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I haven't stopped. But I can't explain that with
words. So I'll have to show you.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: You feel that? The weight? That's not me. That's what
I've been carrying since the night I took the Pendulum.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I'm doing this for you. All of it. The machine, the
Convergence — I found a way to end the cycle. But I need to be
inside it when it breaks.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I'm doing this for you. Remember that. When it's
over, when you see what I've become — remember I chose this.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: That's not him.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: It is. The Pallor doesn't replace — it amplifies
what's already there. His rage, his grief. It's all Cael. Just
the parts he kept buried.

entries.speaker: cael
lines: I can still hear you. I can still — the machine is
close. Don't stop. Please don't stop.

entries.speaker: sable
lines: You heard him. Keep fighting.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: We're not killing him. We're freeing him. Remember
that.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: The spirits can feel him inside the grey. He's
fighting it. We fight with him.

entries.speaker: maren
lines: He should have fallen. The Pallor won't let him.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: One more push. For him. Not against him. For him.

entries.speaker: lira
lines: Cael? Cael!

entries.speaker: maren
lines: The machine is pulling it through. The Pallor —
it's incarnating.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Then we stop it here.
